sponsors.name: Dock Fee Fishing Charters
sponsors.script: This show is sponsored by Dock Fee Fishing Charters out of Saint Augustine, Florida. If you are looking for a chartered fishing trip off of the 23rd best part of Florida, then call Dock Fee Fishing Charters. Be sure to tell them "The Rough" sent you, and get one additional cast on us!

sponsors.name: Audi Jacksonville
sponsors.script: Next time you pull up to your tee time, pull up in style... Visit Audi Jacksonville and select one of the new Q8, S8, or the timeless RS7 models to lug your overpriced clubs around. Remember, it's not about how much you spend... It's about how much people THINK you spend.
